item.title: Version 1.0.19
item.description:
<!-- Release notes generated using configuration in .github/release.yml at v1.0.19 -->
## What's Changed ### Other Changes * Optimize translator panel UI by @rkrkrkk in https://github.com/ggbond268/MacTools/pull/136 * fix: menu bar status item position resets after reboot by @mvanhorn in https://github.com/ggbond268/MacTools/pull/137 * Launchpad: cross-page drag, folders, appearance & label system, iOS folder animation by @Goldenmonstew in https://github.com/ggbond268/MacTools/pull/138
## New Contributors * @mvanhorn made their first contribution in https://github.com/ggbond268/MacTools/pull/137
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/ggbond268/MacTools/compare/v1.0.18...v1.0.19
